---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected, and how often?
     Good example: "When working across multiple machines, I have to re-run envy decrypt
     after every git pull with no way to verify whether the artifact has changed." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How would you solve it? Be as specific as you can.
     Describe the command, flag, or behaviour change you have in mind. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about?
     Why is your proposed solution better than the alternatives? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Anything else that would help — links, prior art in similar tools, mockups, etc.
     If this touches cryptographic design or key handling, explain the security model. -->
